name: NOOPLDR
description: [NOOPLDR](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9025) is a shellcode loader with XML/C# and DLL versions that has been used by [MirrorFace](https://attack.mitre.org/groups/G1054) to load [HiddenFace](https://attack.mitre.org/software/S9023).(Citation: Trend Micro Earth Kasha NOV 2024)
